title: mazus miquelii var. rotundifolius
intro: Mazus miquelii var. rotundifolius, also known as the Round-leaved Mazus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Mazaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mazus miquelii var. rotundifolius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
